meaning: n.装填者,补白,装填物,活页纸,漏斗
examples: The song was originally a filler on their first album.
She is looking forward to the stocking filler.
Students, faculty and staff members filled the bins with filler paper.
Make sure you leave enough slack for a future filler panel in the drive bay.
According to Dr. Singer, the filler should last somewhere between five and nine months.
